description:
Configure TypeScript with strict mode for wc-mcp.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `tsconfig.json` at repo root with `strict: true`, `module: NodeNext`, `moduleResolution: NodeNext`, `target: ES2022`
- `outDir: "./build"`, `rootDir: "./src"`
- `declaration: true`, `declarationMap: true`, `sourceMap: true`
- TypeScript 5.7 installed as devDependency
- `build` script: `tsc && chmod 755 build/index.js`
- `type-check` script: `tsc --noEmit`
- Module format: `"type": "module"` in package.json
- All imports use `.js` extensions (ESM requirement)

## Reference
See planning.md Section 7 (Tech Stack) and Section 8 (package.json target).
